text.title: Self-Healing Locators with Mandatory Audit Diff Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the test-self-healing-locators-audited methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: inventory-locators
step.action: Extract every locator's role + accessible name; flag locators lacking both.

step.name: set-blocklist
step.action: List payment / auth / PII routes; lock their selectors against healing.

step.name: enable-changed-scope
step.action: Configure the healer to operate only on selectors that broke since the last green run.

step.name: wire-diff-output
step.action: Emit heals to `healed-selectors.diff`; require human merge before next run.

step.name: review-and-rollback
step.action: Weekly: reviewer merges acceptable heals, rejects the rest; rollback within 7 days if any merge proves wrong.
